scripts.test: npx cucumber-js --require features/support/**/*.js --require features/step-definitions/**/*.js --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --format junit:reports/cucumber-results.xml features/**/*.feature && node reports/report.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:playwright
scripts.test:headless: npx cucumber-js --publish-quiet --require features/support/**/*.js --require features/step-definitions/**/*.js --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --format junit:reports/cucumber-results.xml features/**/*.feature && node reports/report.js
scripts.test:open: npx cucumber-js --require features/support/**/*.js --require features/step-definitions/**/*.js --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --format junit:reports/cucumber-results.xml features/**/*.feature && node reports/report.js && powershell -NoProfile -Command Start-Process -FilePath 'reports\cucumber-report.html'
